primary_text:
You are spending over $800 a year on routine vet care. You just do not realise it because it comes in separate bills.

Consults at $130 to $150 each. Vaccinations. Dental. Parasite prevention. Blood tests. It adds up.

Best for Pet: $50/month. All of it. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: You spend $800+/yr at the vet. Here is proof.
description: $50/month covers it all. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
